layout_pg_en: fixed small school convenience interior: checkout counter with register anchored front-left, tall metal-wire snack shelves centered on back wall in strict rows, glass-door refrigerated drink cooler on right wall emitting cool cyan spill light, warm overhead fluorescent grid, pale linoleum floor with soft speculars, narrow aisle depth readable — same counter footprint, shelf bay count and cooler position every shot

variants_by_time.傍晚: same layout: exterior twilight barely visible through any door glass, interior fluorescents slightly warmer against cooling daylight, long soft shadows in aisle
variants_by_time.晚上: same footprint: fluorescents dominate, cooler glow stronger, windows or doorway read dark outside, quiet late-hour emptiness

venue.narrative_tone: 货架与收银台之间的公开半私密：适合偶遇、请客、借零钱、递东西时指尖擦过。人流量可高可低，叙事需尊重「店内可能有店员或其他学生」；暧昧以低声、遮挡视线、排队前后为主，避免一键写成真空。

cg_policy.explicit_hint: 营业场所：默认 cg_explicit=false；裸露向须与剧情与全局门槛一致且店员/顾客状态自洽。

world_card_summary: 冰柜嗡鸣与零食袋沙沙声：话题可以装得很日常。
